content: 1. How to download JSRS e-certificate? Login into your JSRS profile > On the dashboard you can view the JSRS e-certification where you can view and download it. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

2. How to change the classification? To update the company classification, suppliers have two options: Email our support team at jsrs@businessgateways.com. Login to their JSRS profile, navigate to MCP, then to 'Basic Information' and click on 'Contact us' to send an email directly to our team.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

3. Duration period of JSRS certification process? On average, the entire JSRS certification process can take between 2 to 3 weeks to complete the final approval.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

4. BGI Office address? Oman Office Address / Location: Business Gateways International Address: Office 14 (2nd Floor), Building 4 Knowledge Oasis Muscat (KOM) Rusayl, Sultanate of Oman Working Hours: 8 AM to 5 PM Oman (Sunday - Thursday).  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.
5. Oman Bank Transfer details? Business Gateways International LLC Bank Muscat, Oman A/c No. 0323014650610016 Swift Code – BMUSOMRXXXX  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

6. International Bank Transfer details? Bank transfer details for International suppliers. Business Gateways International LLC Bank of Beirut (Al-Ghubrah Branch), Oman USD A/c No. 1140100149500 Swift Code – BABEOMRX  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

7. How to view the status of validation? Please log in to your JSRS account, go to the dashboard, and check the "Validation Status" section for updates. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

8. How to change registered email ID?   To change registered email ID: draft a request letter on your company letterhead, sealed and signed by the company signing authority, mentioning the intent to change the email ID from Existing registered email address to mention the new ID (mention both the email IDs) and mail to: jsrs@businessgateways.com 
 For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

9. How to change Company Name? To change company name: draft a request letter on your company letterhead, sealed and signed by the company signing authority, mentioning the intent to change the company name and mention the old company name and new company name. Along with the request letter, attach the new CR. and send it to our team (jsrs@businessgateways.com) team will check and update you.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

0. How do I change / reset the password to the JSRS? On "LOGIN" page click on "Forgot Password” option.  Enter your Email ID, Username, or Mobile Number. Click the link in your email to change the password (or) enter the OTP received in your email. Set a new password (minimum 8 characters, one uppercase letter, one number, one special character) and confirm it. Click "SET PASSWORD"  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

1. How to give module access to users?  To give module access to users: Log in to your JSRS admin account. Navigate to the “Enterprise Admin” > Inside “Users”  
Select the user you want to grant access to. Choose the appropriate modules to assign. Save the changes.  This process will allow the selected user to access the designated modules.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.
2. What is the function of the Monitor User Log? Monitor user log will have the User's login and logout activity details for the past 7 days.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

3. How can I get support to complete my JSRS registration? To get support for completing your registration, contact customer support via email or phone, use the live chat feature, or check the JSRS knowledge base for guidance. JSRS Registration Article:  https://businessgateways.com/jsrs/jsrs-certification/  Registration page: https://jsrs.businessgateways.com/jsrs/TvI4mdhLUdU5ldLLlWmcU9pHT5HdPsXfn5EdQGXF Email id: register@businessgateways.com Contact no: +968-96713467  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

4. How do I map products/services? 
To Map prod/serv, Login into your JSRS Profile> Dashboard > Left vertical toolbar > Slide Menu> JSRS Certification Management> Under Prod/serv section upload the required documents and submit for validation approval  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

5. In case validation declined, how to reapply for SCF?  Log in to your JSRS profile. Go to "JSRS CERTIFICATION MANAGEMENT" where all declined sections will be listed. Click on each section to review the declines and resubmit them for validation and approval.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

6. How do I download the new JSRS mobile application?  Download the new JSRS Mobile App: iOS :  https://apps.apple.com/in/app/bgi-business-gateways-internat/id1118867847  Android : https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.businessgateways.jsrs  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

7. How can I provide feedback or suggestions for JSRS? To provide feedback for JSRS, contact support via email or phone, or use the live chat feature.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

8. Can I book training sessions through the new JSRS mobile app? 
Yes, you can book training sessions through the new JSRS mobile app.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

9. How can I receive tender notifications? Tender notifications will be sent to your registered email address. Additionally, you can view them within your JSRS profile under the "Opportunities" section.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

0. How do I access the JSearch module within JSRS? To access the JSearch module within JSRS, log in to your account and locate the JSearch module on the dashboard. Click on it to use its features for searching JSRS certified suppliers and related information.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

1. How do I view and respond to tenders in the JSRS Tenders module? To view and respond to tenders, log in to your JSRS profile, go to the JSRS Tenders module from your dashboard, browse the available tenders, and follow the instructions to submit your response. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

2. Can you please share with me the current contractors who work with PDO? To know more about the current contractors working with PDO, please email our support team at jsrs@businessgateways.com. 
For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

3. Are there any tutorials available for using the new JSRS modules?   The JSRS team will shortly release tutorial videos designed to simplify the use of all modules for suppliers. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

4. What is the process for updating expired documents for my company?  After logging in to your JSRS profile, go to the JSRS Certification Management (SCF form). Expired documents will be indicated—update them and submit for validation and approval.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

5. How to change account password? Log in to your JSRS profile. On the Dashboard, in the user details section, click the dropdown icon and select "Account Settings" to change your password. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

6. How to Access report (The Energy Year Report)?  Inside your JSRS profile, go to the dashboard and find "Access Reports" on the menu bar. Click on it to view "The Energy Year Report." For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

7. Why is the "Map" button not getting enabled when I try to designate an employee as the ICV in charge? Inside the ICV In-Charge Personnel section, set the status to "YES" to make the next steps visible. Also, ensure you have selected the user and clicked on "MAP."  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.
8. What should I enter in the "Display Name" field? In the "Display Name" field, you should enter the actual name of the product or service. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

9. How can I update our company address? Login into your JSRS Profile> Dashboard > Left vertical toolbar > Slide Menu> Under MCP (Master Company Profile)> Market Presence > Click on " Registered Office" click on "Edit" option, Once details entered click on "Update"  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.
0. How to remove the decline prod/serv? Please email our support team at jsrs@businessgateways.com Our team will check and respond you back.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

1. Can I use the JSRS J3 application on my phone? 
Yes, you can receive tender notifications and procurement enquiries directly on the new JSRS Mobile App! Manage your company profile, book training sessions, and explore many more features.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

2. How do I schedule a meeting session? Inside JConnect, please click on "Request For Support Meeting," fill in the details, and submit the form; our team will respond to you promptly.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.
3. How will I know if my registration is approved? You will receive a notification via email once your registration has been reviewed and approved. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

4. How do I participate in tenders through the JSRS? Once registered, you can access tender opportunities posted by participating companies through the JSRS portal and submit your bids online. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

5. What happens if my registration expires? If your registration expires, you may lose access to tender opportunities and other benefits. You will need to renew your registration to restore full access. 
For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

6. How do I know which documents to submit for registration? The JSRS website will provide a checklist of required documents during the registration process. Ensure you have all listed documents ready before starting your registration.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

7. Can I register multiple companies under one account? he registration is based on the Commercial Registration number, so each company needs to be individually registered to keep information accurate and to engage with more business opportunities. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

8. What should I do if my Supplier Certification Form is rejected? If your SCF (Supplier Certification Form) is rejected, you will receive notifications on the reasons for rejection. You can address the issues and resubmit for approval.   For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

9. What benefits do certified suppliers receive? Certified suppliers gain increased visibility, credibility, and access to more business opportunities within the industry.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

0. Are there resources available to help me with the certification process? Yes, the JSRS website typically offers resources like user guides, FAQs, and customer support to assist you. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

1. Can international suppliers apply for certification? Yes, international companies can register with JSRS as an International supplier and provide the necessary documentation.          For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

2. Is there a fee for the certification process? Yes, the JSRS fees structure is applicable to all suppliers, including both national (Oman) suppliers and international suppliers.        For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

3. Can I reapply for JSRS certification if it has expired? Yes, you can reapply for JSRS certification by renewing it. Our renewal support team will assist you throughout the process to ensure everything is completed smoothly. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

4. Can I apply for certification if my company is new? Yes, new companies can apply for certification as long as they meet the required criteria and provide necessary documentation.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

5. What should I do if I am missing a required document? Please contact JSRS support for guidance on how to proceed. Our support team will guide you. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

6. Will I receive a certificate once my application is approved? Yes, you will receive a JSRS e-certification document once your application/Profile is JSRS approved.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.
7. How often is certification renewed? Depending on the classification and country, JSRS certification is usually valid for one to three years. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

8. I am unable to log in to my JSRS account. What should I do? Ensure you are using the correct username and password. If you’ve forgotten your password, use the "Forgot Password" link to reset it. If the issue persists, clear your browser cache or try using a different browser. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

9. I am unable to upload documents. What should I do? Make sure your documents are in the right format. If you're still having trouble, try using a different browser or check your internet connection. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

0. I receive an error when submitting SCF (Supplier certification Form) forms. What could be wrong? Check for any missing mandatory fields or incorrect data formats. If everything seems correct, try submitting the form again.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

1. Are there any discounts offered for JSRS fees? Please provide the details No, there are no discounts offered for JSRS Subscription Fees. The Fees are set by the Oman Ministry of Energy and Minerals (MEM) and are non-negotiable. All fees must be paid as specified by the Ministry's guidelines. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

2. Do we have any Value-Added Services in JSRS? Businessgateways, in its continues efforts to add more value to its Supplier, offers GCC open Tenders Service opportunities across ALL industries from the GCC countries. Suppliers can also access Sourcing Hub and initiate internal collaborations with jDo.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

3. Do we need to pay a separate fee for each product and service added to the Supplier Company?  No, there is one common Fee for Certification that covers all Products and Services.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.
4. Are Site Visits applicable for international suppliers?  No, Site Visit verification is only applicable to National (Omani) companies.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.
5. Can International Suppliers register on JSRS? Yes, International Suppliers can register on JSRS by providing relevant documentation. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

6. Are fees applicable for GCC tender participation through JSRS? Yes, there are fees associated with accessing GCC Tender Services, and the GCC packs are  customized based on the selected subscription plan. For more details, please contact us via email at gcctenders@businessgateways.com  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.
7. Oman Bank Transfer details? Business Gateways International LLC Bank Muscat, Oman A/c No. 0323014650610016 Swift Code – BMUSOMRXXXX  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

8. International Bank Transfer details?  Bank transfer details for International suppliers. Business Gateways International LLC Bank of Beirut (Al-Ghubrah Branch), Oman USD A/c No. 1140100149500 Swift Code – BABEOMRX  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

9. Which specific operators require separate vendor registration after JSRS registration?  Out of 23 Operators currently utilising the JSRS, only PDO and OQ require separate vendor registration to access their posted tender opportunities.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

0. Please share the list of documents that are mandatory.  Please find the mandatory documents for National/International suppliers in the below link: https://businessgateways.com/landing/img/JSRS-Mandatory-Documents.pdf For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

1. What is the NBF no? NBF stands for ‘National Business Framework’, and the NBF number is your registration number, indicating you have completed the registration process with us. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

2. What is the JSRS supplier code? The supplier code will be issued to you upon approval by JSRS and receipt of your certification. This code will serve as your primary identifier to be shared with operators, contractors, or buyers as required. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

3. What is the JSRS Username? The JSRS username is the unique identifier you use to log in to your Joint Supplier Registration System (JSRS) account. It allows you to access your profile, manage your registration details, and interact with the JSRS platform. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

4. What is Supplier 360? The JSRS Supplier 360 provides complete visibility of the Active Supplier Organisation and their activity on the JSRS. An insight to the JSRS Certificate Status & Validity is also displayed to the Operator.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

5. What can be viewed on the Supplier 360 form?  • Details of the Supplier Organisation as given during the Registration process •    JSRS Certification Status •    Products & Services on their Profile •    Activity on the Contracts Management System (CMS) • Supplier Certification Form (SCF Manager  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

6. Are there any restrictions on the number of products and services we can upload? There is no limit to the number of products and services a company can upload on its profile page. However, we recommend updating your products and services regularly.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

7. Is it possible to Change the Style of Incorporation after the Company is registered? Yes, it is possible to change the Style of Incorporation from the Master Company Profile for all the type of Style of Incorporation with an exception to “Foreign Branch Company”. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

8. What is SkyCards? SkyCards are a great way to manage your B2B engagement on the JSRS. SkyCards are virtual business cards that can be managed even after being ‘dropped’ to other companies on the NBF/JSRS Tiers. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.
9. What is JDrive? It functions as a JSRS Document Repository System, allowing you to access your folders and files efficiently.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.
0. How many contacts can be provided during registration? • Primary Contact • Operations Contact • Payment Contact For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

1. What are the modes of payment available? There are two modes of payment available on the JSRS Application: Online Payment & Offline Payment. Online Payment: The JSRS Certification fee can be paid online through the Payment Gateway of 
Bank Muscat hosted on the JSRS. You can also pay using Credit/Debit cards. It is important that your Credit/Debit Cards are '3D Secure' approved before it can be used on our system. Offline Payment: The Offline payment can be done via: Cheque or Cash Deposit & Bank Transfer.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

2. Are there any restrictions on the number of products and services we can upload? There is no limit to the number of products and services a company can upload on its profile page. However, we recommend updating your products and services regularly.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

3. Is it possible to Change the Style of Incorporation after the Company is registered? Yes, it is possible to change the Style of Incorporation from the Master Company Profile for all the type of Style of Incorporation with an exception to “Foreign Branch Company”.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

4. How to change a Company’s Style of Incorporation after registration, for example, if the Company is registered with Style of Incorporation as “Foreign Branch Company”?  Please use the Contact Us form, available on the Master Company Profile, to send the request to the support team.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

5. Is it possible to change the Style of Incorporation from any other category to “Foreign Branch Company”? No, the JSRS application does not allow the Style of Incorporation to change from any Category to “Foreign Branch Company” as the Company Classification for any Company registered as “Foreign Branch Company” is considered as LARGE.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.
6. How do we keep our data updated? You can login to JSRS and update the relevant company data: Master Company Profile and the Supplier Profile.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

7. Which search categories are available for suppliers in jSearch? A Supplier can search in jSearch based on Products, Services, Suppliers, and People.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

8. What is an External Profile, and how can it be utilised? The External Profile summarizes your company profile to other Suppliers and Buyers, displaying all relevant details such as company information, services, location, and contact details, which can be easily shared.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

9. What are the required fields for National Suppliers under SCF? Certification Contact, Corporate Summary, Financials, Products & Services, QMS/HSE, ICV Elements, Reference, Special Status, Insurance & Legal, Information & Communication Technology and Shareholders Information. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

0. What are the required fields for International suppliers under SCF? Certification Contact, Corporate Summary, Financials, Products & Services, QMS/HSE, References, Insurance & Legal, Information & Communication Technology and Shareholders Information. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

1. What is Jconnect? If you’re looking for webinar/JSRS training session  Please Login>homepage>JSRS connect (on the left bar) 
Click on it and you will have the calendar schedules for support webinar (live online-webinar) and classroom training session (Physical session @ BGI office) Please apply and attend it. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

2. Do we have option to change our company classification? To update the company classification, suppliers have two options: Email our support team at jsrs@businessgateways.com. Log in to their JSRS profile, navigate to MCP, locate 'Basic Information' and click on 'Contact us' to send an email directly to our team.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

3. Please share the list of documents that are mandatory.       Please find the mandatory documents for National/International suppliers in the below link        https://businessgateways.com/landing/img/JSRS-Mandatory-Documents.pdf  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

4. What is Supplier 360? Supplier 360" in JSRS refers to a comprehensive view or profile of a supplier within the system. It typically includes detailed information such as the supplier's registration details, certifications, compliance status, and other relevant data.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

5. How many Activities can be selected for each Division? Only 10 Activities can be selected against each Division and Mapped to the Business Source.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

6. Are there any restrictions on the number of products and services we can upload? There is no limit to the number of products and services a company can upload on its profile page. However, we recommend updating your products and services page regularly.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

7. What is SKY CARDS ?  SkyCards are a great way to manage your B2B engagement on the JSRS. SkyCards are virtual business cards that can be managed even after being ‘dropped’ to other companies on the NBF/JSRS Tiers.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.
8. What are mandatory sections inside MCP?  • Basic Information • Division • Registered office  • External profile.   For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

9. How to add user ? Please login into your JSRS profile>Inside Enterprise admin, click 'Add Users' to open the side menu. Note: Fields marked with ‘*’ are mandatory. Select modules and actions for the user in the JSRS portal. Click 'Add' to save permissions, then proceed to the Add User side. After a user is added, they will receive a verification email to set their password. Once they confirm their email, their status will be updated to Active, and they will become official users. Active users can be deactivated/reactivated via the action column.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

0. How to add Division? Please login into your JSRS profile>Inside Enterprise Admin, click on “Division”. Click the "Add Division" button to open the side panel, where you can add up to 10 divisions. Fill in all mandatory fields (marked with *), enter a unique Division Reference Name (or use the Business Sector Name), select the Division Sector, and provide a short description. Click "Add" to save the division.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

1. How to add Department? Please login into your JSRS profile> once inside > Please navigate to “Enterprise ADMIN” Click the "Add Department" button to open the side panel and add departments to your company. Fill in all mandatory fields (*) and click "Add" to save. After adding, you'll be directed to the Department section, where all departments are listed with options to Edit and Deactivate.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

2. What are mandatory sections under SCF for National Suppliers?  • Certification Contact • Corporate Summary • Financials • Products & Services • QMS/HSE • ICV Elements • Reference • Special Status • Insurance & Legal • Information & Communication Technology • Shareholders Information.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

3. What are mandatory sections under SCF for International Suppliers?  • Certification Contact • Corporate Summary 
• Financials • Products & Services • QMS/HSE • References  • Insurance & Legal • Information & Communication Technology • Shareholders Information  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.
4. What is Jdo? The JSRS jDo feature supports intense collaboration between your internal Users who are registered on the JSRS (JSRS Champions).  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.
5. What is JDrive? It serves as a JSRS Document Repository System from where you can access your folders and files efficiently. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

6. How can I update my company's information on JSRS? You can update your company's information by logging into your JSRS account and making the necessary changes in your profile. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

7. What happens if my JSRS Certification expires? If your certification expires, your company will no longer be active as a JSRS Certified Supplier. You must renew your certification to regain access to the platform’s benefits. 
For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

8. Can I track the status of my JSRS Certification application? Yes, you can track the status of your application by logging into your JSRS account. The system will provide updates on the progress of your certification. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

9. How does JSRS ensure the credibility of its certified suppliers? JSRS conducts a thorough evaluation of all companies during the certification process, including verification of legal documents, financial stability, and other relevant certifications to ensure credibility. For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.

0. Can I customize my search criteria in Jsearch? Yes, Jsearch offers advanced search filters that allow you to customize your search criteria based on industry, location, certification status, and other relevant factors to find the best business matches.  For more assistance, reach out to our chat agents.
